Subject: Billing receipt missing
Customer Message: Can I download a receipt for last month's invoice?
Support Reply: Open Billing, select Invoices, then click Download receipt for the invoice month.

Subject: Invoice PDF export
Customer Message: Where can I export invoice PDFs for finance?
Support Reply: Open Billing, select Invoices, then download the PDF from the invoice row.
